text: {"fixed_xml":"<ITEM>Bey Herrn Daniel Haag dem Buchbinder sind zu verkauffen: <BIBL><TITLE>Steiners Fest-Gedancken</TITLE> in <FORMAT>Fol.</FORMAT> <PRIZE>2. fl. 24. kr.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Neues und vollkommenes Gebettbuch</TITLE> in <FORMAT>gro\\u221a\\u00fc 8v\\u221a\\u2264.</FORMAT> von <AUTHOR>Pfarrer Stehelin</AUTHOR> in <PLACE>St. Gallen</PLACE>, ohngebunden <PRIZE>46. kr.</PRIZE>; gebunden in Leder und Schlotz \\u221a\\u2020 <PRIZE>fl. 1. 10. kr.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Memoires de Rochester</TITLE>, <FORMAT>8v\\u221a\\u2264.</FORMAT> ohngebunden \\u221a\\u2020 <PRIZE>6. Batzen;</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Maupertuis</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Anf\\u221a\\u00a7ng der Geographie</TITLE> <FORMAT>8v\\u221a\\u2264.</FORMAT> <PRIZE>6. kr.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Messung des Meridians Gradus</TITLE>, <FORMAT>8v\\u221a\\u2264.</FORMAT> <PRIZE>12. Batzen;</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Satura pars II.</TITLE> <FORMAT>8v\\u221a\\u2264.</FORMAT> <PRIZE>18. kr.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Gespr\\u221a\\u00a7ch von den W\\u221a\\u00barmen welche bey Anfang dieses Jahrs auf dem Schnee gefunden worden</TITLE> \\u221a\\u2020 <PRIZE>8. Rappen,</PRIZE></BIBL> und viele andere mehr, davon der Bericht bey Ihme zu vernemmen.</ITEM>","number_of_corrections":3,"explanation":"1) Fixed improper nesting: the \"Memoires de Rochester\" BIBL was not closed before the \"Maupertuis\" BIBL began (nested BIBLs). Closed it after \"6. Batzen;\" and made the Maupertuis entry a sibling BIBL. 2) Corrected the tag <PRICE>12. Batzen;</PRICE> to <PRIZE>12. Batzen;</PRIZE> to match the consistent PRIZE tagging used elsewhere. 3) Restructured the final BIBL so the closing tag follows the price (\"8. Rappen,\") rather than after the trailing sentence \"und viele andere mehr...\", which is general descriptive text belonging to the ITEM rather than a bibliographic entry; moved </BIBL> before that text and kept the closing </ITEM> at the end."}

parsed.fixed_xml: <ITEM>Bey Herrn Daniel Haag dem Buchbinder sind zu verkauffen: <BIBL><TITLE>Steiners Fest-Gedancken</TITLE> in <FORMAT>Fol.</FORMAT> <PRIZE>2. fl. 24. kr.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Neues und vollkommenes Gebettbuch</TITLE> in <FORMAT>gro\u221a\u00fc 8v\u221a\u2264.</FORMAT> von <AUTHOR>Pfarrer Stehelin</AUTHOR> in <PLACE>St. Gallen</PLACE>, ohngebunden <PRIZE>46. kr.</PRIZE>; gebunden in Leder und Schlotz \u221a\u2020 <PRIZE>fl. 1. 10. kr.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Memoires de Rochester</TITLE>, <FORMAT>8v\u221a\u2264.</FORMAT> ohngebunden \u221a\u2020 <PRIZE>6. Batzen;</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Maupertuis</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Anf\u221a\u00a7ng der Geographie</TITLE> <FORMAT>8v\u221a\u2264.</FORMAT> <PRIZE>6. kr.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Messung des Meridians Gradus</TITLE>, <FORMAT>8v\u221a\u2264.</FORMAT> <PRIZE>12. Batzen;</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Satura pars II.</TITLE> <FORMAT>8v\u221a\u2264.</FORMAT> <PRIZE>18. kr.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Gespr\u221a\u00a7ch von den W\u221a\u00barmen welche bey Anfang dieses Jahrs auf dem Schnee gefunden worden</TITLE> \u221a\u2020 <PRIZE>8. Rappen,</PRIZE></BIBL> und viele andere mehr, davon der Bericht bey Ihme zu vernemmen.</ITEM>
parsed.explanation: 1) Fixed improper nesting: the "Memoires de Rochester" BIBL was not closed before the "Maupertuis" BIBL began (nested BIBLs). Closed it after "6. Batzen;" and made the Maupertuis entry a sibling BIBL. 2) Corrected the tag <PRICE>12. Batzen;</PRICE> to <PRIZE>12. Batzen;</PRIZE> to match the consistent PRIZE tagging used elsewhere. 3) Restructured the final BIBL so the closing tag follows the price ("8. Rappen,") rather than after the trailing sentence "und viele andere mehr...", which is general descriptive text belonging to the ITEM rather than a bibliographic entry; moved </BIBL> before that text and kept the closing </ITEM> at the end.
